changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tool_config.rs:312-404

The three watcher tests (`test_watcher_detects_file_change`, `test_watcher_no_reload_when_unchanged`, `test_watcher_deleted_file_reverts_to_all_enabled`) are annotated `#[tokio::test]` but `check_and_reload` is a synchronous `fn` that does no async work. Using `#[tokio::test]` spins up a full Tokio runtime unnecessarily.

Suggestion: Change to `#[test]` (plain synchronous test). The only async-looking operation is `std::thread::sleep` which is already used (not `tokio::time::sleep`), confirming these are sync tests.

Verification: `cargo nextest run --package swissarmyhammer-tools` passes with `#[test]`.

#review-finding
nit: watcher test uses tokio::test but check_and_reload is synchronous
